data_flow_pipeline.entry_point: main() in src/bin/bat/main.rs parses command-line arguments using clap::App and constructs a Config object

stages.responsibility: Parse command-line arguments, build configuration, determine visual styles
stages.input: Command-line arguments, environment variables, config files
stages.output: Config struct with all user preferences, StyleComponents, theme selection

stages.responsibility: Load syntax definitions, color themes, and language mappings
stages.input: Config with theme and syntax preferences

stages.responsibility: Open and read input files or stdin, detect encoding
stages.output: OpenedInput with file metadata and InputReader

stages.responsibility: Detect appropriate syntax definition based on file extension, name, or first line
Expand tabs, strip ANSI codes, handle non-printable characters, filter visible line ranges
stages.input: Raw lines from InputReader, line range configuration

stages.responsibility: Apply syntax highlighting, compute styles, generate line decorations
stages.output: Styled lines with ANSI escape sequences and decoration metadata

stages.responsibility: Handle ANSI escape sequences, manage text wrapping, compute display widths
Write to stdout or pipe to pager, handle scrolling
stages.output: Terminal display via stdout or pager process

data_flow_pipeline.exit_point: OutputType::handle() writes formatted output to stdout or spawns a pager process

theme.role: Theme selection and color scheme detection

cross_module_interactions.interaction: main() constructs Config from CLI arguments
cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Command-line flags, theme preference, style components, paging mode

cross_module_interactions.interaction: main() creates Controller and calls run()
Controller opens and reads input files
cross_module_interactions.data_passed: File paths or stdin stream -> OpenedInput and InputReader

cross_module_interactions.interaction: Controller delegates line-by-line printing to InteractivePrinter
cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Config, HighlightingAssets, opened input, output handle

cross_module_interactions.interaction: Printer uses HighlightingAssets for syntax and theme

cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Line number, style configuration, line metadata
Raw line content, nonprintable notation settings

cross_module_interactions.interaction: Printer uses vscreen for ANSI escape sequences
cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Styled line with escape sequences -> wrapped display

cross_module_interactions.interaction: InputReader may use preprocessor for encoding

extension_proposal.feature: Custom output formatter plugin system for HTML, JSON, LaTeX export
extension_proposal.required_changes: 1. Create formatters.rs with trait OutputFormatter. 2. Modify output.rs for formatter plugins. 3. Extend Config for formatter selection. 4. Update printer.rs to emit structured style events. 5. Add formatter implementations.
extension_proposal.integration_points: After printer.rs generates styled lines, output passes through selected OutputFormatter. Config gains output_format field. main.rs instantiates appropriate formatter based on CLI flags.
